identity.canonical_title: Suggesting System Initializes At Point Relation

theory.canonical_statement: ID3694 records Suggesting System Initializes At Point Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\hand_coordinates.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $), suggesting the system initializes at a point of maximum irrationality to prevent decoherence. \subsection{The Pentagonal Step} The expansion phase (from Singularity to the Four Corners) follows an angular step of: \begin{equation} \Delta \theta_{\text{exp}} = 37.30^\circ \end{equation} This aligns with the internal angle of a regular pentagon ($
